personal.title: MIS Analyst | Data Quality Specialist | Reporting & Dashboard Expert
personal.summary: Results-driven MIS Analyst and Data Quality Specialist with 4+ years of experience designing automated reporting systems, maintaining 99.8% data accuracy, and delivering end-to-end MIS cycles for senior leadership. Proven expertise in SQL, Python, and Advanced Excel for transforming raw operational data into actionable KPI dashboards.

experience.role: Subject-Matter Expert — Data Quality & MIS Analyst

certifications.name: Google Cloud Data Analytics Professional Certificate

expert.skill: Advanced Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, Macros)

projects.title: MIS Automation Platform
projects.description: Engineered end-to-end automated reporting system to eliminate manual verification bottlenecks
projects.challenge: 40+ hours per week spent on manual verification across production, training, and WFH operations. High risk of errors during peak loads.
projects.solution: Designed and deployed automated WFH, Production, and Training MIS dashboards with real-time data feeds. Implemented multi-layer validation protocols and automated alerts for anomalies.
impact: 15% reduction in manual verification time (40+ hours → 35 hours/week)
100% on-time reporting for senior leadership decisions
projects.keyHighlight: Automated system reduces workload from 40+ hours to 35 hours/week while improving accuracy metrics

projects.title: Data Quality Governance Model
projects.description: Designed performance-based incentive system to drive data quality compliance across teams
projects.challenge: Inconsistent data submission quality across analyst teams. High escalation rates (30%+) due to validation failures. No standardized quality benchmarks.
projects.solution: Created performance-based incentive model tied directly to data quality KPIs. Implemented transparent metrics dashboard visible to all teams. Established SOP documentation and standardized validation protocols.
impact: Measurable improvement in submission accuracy across all teams
Model adopted as template for team-wide quality improvement
projects.keyHighlight: Performance model became the gold standard and was adopted company-wide for quality management

projects.title: Virat Kohli IPL Performance Analysis
projects.description: End-to-end analytics pipeline analyzing complex cricket data to identify performance patterns
projects.challenge: Analyze large ball-by-ball IPL dataset to understand Virat Kohli's performance patterns, vulnerabilities, and scoring trends across different delivery types and pitch conditions.
projects.solution: Built complete analytics pipeline: Data ingestion → Python transformation (Pandas/NumPy) → Tableau visualization. Conducted structured RCA on dismissal trends and delivery type correlations.
impact: Identified strike rate patterns across delivery types (short-pitch vs. full-length)
Correlated batting performance with pitch conditions
Conducted RCA on dismissal trends against specific bowlers
projects.keyHighlight: Demonstrates end-to-end analytics expertise: raw data → transformation → insight visualization. Replicates MIS analyst approach to problem-solving.

uniqueSellingPoints.description: Maintains exceptionally high data quality standards, demonstrating precision and quality-focused mindset in all operations
Manages complete MIS cycles (Daily/Weekly/Monthly) showing maturity and full lifecycle understanding
Conducts Pareto analysis and RCA to identify systemic improvements and drive operational excellence
Delivered 15% reduction in manual verification time through intelligent system design
Successfully manages calibration sessions and reporting for global cross-functional teams
Proficient across Excel → SQL/Python → Tableau pipeline (data transformation to visualization)
Promoted 3 times in 4.5 years: Support Engineer → Operations Analyst → Subject-Matter Expert

designSystem.aesthetic: Data-Driven Minimalism with Strategic Color Accents
